observation_title: Inadequate Multi-Factor Authentication for High-Value Transactions
observation_desc: High-value transactions above INR 50,000 do not enforce step-up authentication as required by RBI circular.
action_plan: Implement step-up OTP authentication for transactions above threshold. Complete by Q2 FY25.

observation_title: Session Timeout Not Aligned with RBI Guidelines
observation_desc: Web session timeout set to 60 minutes. RBI guidelines require maximum 5 minutes for internet banking.
action_plan: Reduce session timeout to 5 minutes of inactivity as per RBI IT Framework Section 4.3.

observation_title: Privileged Access Reviews Not Conducted Quarterly
observation_desc: Privileged access reviews for CBS are conducted annually instead of quarterly as per policy.
action_plan: Implement quarterly PAR process. Automate with IAM tooling. Next review due March 31.

observation_desc: External ASV vulnerability scans show 3 open critical vulnerabilities older than 90 days.
action_plan: Remediate open critical vulnerabilities. Schedule re-scan within 30 days of remediation.

observation_title: Incident Reporting Delay Beyond CERT-In 6-Hour Mandate
observation_desc: 3 cyber incidents in Q3 FY24 reported to CERT-In beyond the mandated 6-hour window.
action_plan: Implement automated CERT-In reporting workflow. Define escalation matrix with 4-hour internal SLA.
